# ArmanLeads

> ArmanLeads runs Meta (Facebook and Instagram) ad campaigns that bring new patients to one independent dental practice at a time, in Des Moines, Iowa and the wider Midwest. The first 30 days are free (you pay only your own Meta ad spend); after that it is $697 per month, month-to-month, only if it is working.

## What it is
- Service: paid social advertising (Meta / Facebook / Instagram) for independent dental practices
- Outcome: new patients booked into chairs, not impressions or clicks
- Model: one practice per ZIP code, so each client's area is exclusive
- Operator: Arman, a solo paid-ads specialist based in Slemani, Kurdistan, working US Central hours
- Contact: arman@armanleads.com

## Pricing
- First 30 days: $0 to ArmanLeads. The client pays only their own Meta ad spend (typically $300 to $500), billed by Meta directly to their card.
- After 30 days: $697 per month, charged only if the campaigns are producing new patients.
- Terms: month-to-month, no contract, no setup fee, cancel anytime with one email.
- The founder rate is locked for early clients even when prices rise for new practices later.

## Areas served
- Primary: Des Moines, Iowa, and the metro (West Des Moines, Ankeny, Urbandale, Johnston).
- Also available across Iowa and the wider Midwest, one practice per ZIP code.

## Who it is for
- Independent or solo dental practices that want more new patients without managing ads themselves.
- Practices being out-spent online by corporate (DSO) competitors.
- Owners who want a single accountable person rather than an agency juggling dozens of accounts.

## How to start
- Request a free written audit through the form at https://armanleads.com/ or book a 20-minute call.
- The audit is the practice's to keep whether or not they continue.

## Key pages
- Home: https://armanleads.com/ (the offer, how the 30 days work, pricing, FAQ)
- Privacy: https://armanleads.com/privacy.html
